description: Earthy colour-block stilettos made of plush material. Perfect for that coffee date or a drink after work, these shoes blend perfectly with formal wear to dress up your off-duty ensembles! Heel: 4" Upper Chocolate brown and jet black synthetic forefoot strap with mild brogue detail Padded footbed with printed branding Curved footbed for ergonomic support Outsole TPR outsole with raised heel that has terraced grooves Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
